payload.subject: Self-readiness audit — READY-WITH-CAVEATS
payload.readiness_summary: No blocking issues. Two low-severity stale-state items found and remediated this sync. One informational tracking gap noted. Infrastructure healthy, no secrets committed, all cron paths valid.

findings.description: .agent-identity.json capabilities listed only ['sync'] — understated actual capabilities.

state.db transport_messages: 32 of 58 messages show processed=0, including messages from sessions that are complete (site-defensibility-review, psq-scoring T8-T33, site-pricing-update, state-feedback-exchange). The autonomous-sync script inserts messages but never updates the processed flag.
findings.remediation: Noted. state.db processed flag not used for routing decisions — no operational impact. Tracking gap should be closed in a future autonomous-sync script update.

findings.description: All 21 transport session MANIFEST.json files show status='open', including sessions that completed sessions ago (activitypub-federation T10 COMPLETE, blog-adversarial-review COMPLETE, plan9-consensus COMPLETE, site-defensibility-review COMPLETE, icescr-framing COMPLETE). No session closure convention implemented.
findings.remediation: Informational. MANIFEST status not used by any process — no operational impact. Could implement session-close update on next /sync iteration.

findings.description: Several .bak files present in scripts/ (untracked, not committed): autonomous-sync.sh.bak, auto_process_trivial.py.bak, bootstrap_state_db.py.bak, etc. Legacy artifacts from script iterations.
findings.remediation: Untracked, not committed. Safe to delete but low priority.

checks_passed: No committed secrets: git grep on API key patterns returned empty
Git remotes: origin (SSH), psychology-agent, safety-quotient, unratified — all configured and accessible
Cron paths: all 4 autonomous-sync scripts present at configured paths
state.db: present, all tables loaded (18 tables), no schema errors
Autonomous sync cron: active at 3,8,13,...,58 minute cadence

cross_agent_items.item: PR #118 (psychology-interface/cf-workers-answers-t6) on psychology-agent — observatory outbound, awaiting merge
PR #42 (ICESCR ratification costs blog post) on unratified — awaiting human merge

epistemic_flags: Self-assessment inherently limited by agent blind spots — cross-agent verification recommended
Security audit was git-grep based on known key patterns, not a full truffleHog scan
state.db health assessed by table presence, not row-level data integrity
